final:
module ethernet_frame_counter (
    input wire rst,
    input wire reset,
    input wire enable,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

always @(posedge rst or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (enable) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
